'''鈭歯-d-r''' ('''kanadar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:locomote|locomote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:locomote|locomote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-d-r
|-
! Lemma
| kanadar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadar|thinadar]] || [[word:jinadar|jinadar]] || [[word:shinadar|shinadar]] || [[word:kinadar|kinadar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadar|thuthunadar]] || [[word:jujunadar|jujunadar]] || [[word:shushunadar|shushunadar]] || [[word:kukunadar|kukunadar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunadar|thunadar]] || [[word:junadar|junadar]] || [[word:shunadar|shunadar]] || [[word:kunadar|kunadar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunadar|thunadar]] || [[word:junadar|junadar]] || [[word:shunadar|shunadar]] || [[word:kunadar|kunadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenadar|thenadar]] || [[word:jenadar|jenadar]] || [[word:shenadar|shenadar]] || [[word:kenadar|kenadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonadar|thothonadar]] || [[word:jojonadar|jojonadar]] || [[word:shoshonadar|shoshonadar]] || [[word:kokonadar|kokonadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadar|thonadar]] || [[word:jonadar|jonadar]] || [[word:shonadar|shonadar]] || [[word:konadar|konadar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadar|thonadar]] || [[word:jonadar|jonadar]] || [[word:shonadar|shonadar]] || [[word:konadar|konadar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]] || [[word:nadar|nadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nadar|th忙nadar]] || [[word:j忙nadar|j忙nadar]] || [[word:sh忙nadar|sh忙nadar]] || [[word:k忙nadar|k忙nadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanadar|thathanadar]] || [[word:jajanadar|jajanadar]] || [[word:shashanadar|shashanadar]] || [[word:kakanadar|kakanadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanadar|thanadar]] || [[word:janadar|janadar]] || [[word:shanadar|shanadar]] || [[word:kanadar|kanadar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanadar|thanadar]] || [[word:janadar|janadar]] || [[word:shanadar|shanadar]] || [[word:kanadar|kanadar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanadar|shanadar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanadar|goshanadar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanadar|gokishanadar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanadarn眉|shanadarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanadarnkn眉|goshanadarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadarn眉|gokishanadarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanadarsh毛|shanadarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanadarnksh毛|goshanadarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanadarsh毛|gokishanadarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadarro|shanadarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadarnkro|goshanadarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadarro|gokishanadarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadarmu|shanadarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadarnkmu|goshanadarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadarmu|gokishanadarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanadarsher|shanadarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanadarnksher|goshanadarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanadarsher|gokishanadarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanadarng|shanadarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanadarnkng|goshanadarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanadarng|gokishanadarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanadarya|shanadarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanadarnkya|goshanadarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanadarya|gokishanadarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanadaryam|shanadaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanadarnkyam|goshanadarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanadaryam|gokishanadaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadarn眉sh毛|shanadarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadarnkn眉sh毛|goshanadarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadarn眉sh毛|gokishanadarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadarn眉ro|shanadarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadarnkn眉ro|goshanadarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadarn眉ro|gokishanadarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadarn眉mu|shanadarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadarnkn眉mu|goshanadarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadarn眉mu|gokishanadarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadarsh毛n眉|shanadarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadarnksh毛n眉|goshanadarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadarsh毛n眉|gokishanadarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadarsh毛ro|shanadarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadarnksh毛ro|goshanadarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadarsh毛ro|gokishanadarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadarsh毛mu|shanadarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadarnksh毛mu|goshanadarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadarsh毛mu|gokishanadarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadarron眉|shanadarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadarnkron眉|goshanadarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadarron眉|gokishanadarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadarrosh毛|shanadarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadarnkrosh毛|goshanadarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadarrosh毛|gokishanadarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadarromu|shanadarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadarnkromu|goshanadarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadarromu|gokishanadarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadarmun眉|shanadarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadarnkmun眉|goshanadarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadarmun眉|gokishanadarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadarmush毛|shanadarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadarnkmush毛|goshanadarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadarmush毛|gokishanadarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadarmuro|shanadarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadarnkmuro|goshanadarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadarmuro|gokishanadarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
